message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Update Relationship Event Handler UML

box "SNS" #Pink
participant "Event Dispatcher Topic" as EDT
end box

box "Lambda" #Orange
participant "Update Relationship Event Handler" as UREH
end box

box "DynamoDB" #Blue
participant "Relationship Owner Table" as ROT
participant "Relationship Commitment Table" as RCT
end box

EDT -> UREH : filter on\nRelationship::Update Event

UREH -> UREH : [SessionDecorator.puml]
UREH -> UREH : [TrackEventHandlerWrapper.puml]
UREH -> UREH : extract Message from Event
UREH -> UREH : validate Message
UREH -> UREH : validate event-name
UREH -> UREH : validate event-version
UREH -> UREH : validate stage

UREH -> ROT : Get Existing Relationship
ROT --> UREH

UREH -> UREH : Generate Relationship Dict
UREH -> UREH : Combine Existing Relationship\nAttributes With New Changes

opt if missing required schema key
UREH -> UREH : <color:red>Error Handling</color>
end

UREH -> UREH : Get AdditionalAttributes

alt if Relationship contains description and AdditionalAttributes\ndoesn't contain completed signal
UREH -> ROT : update Relationship
else Error Handling
UREH -> UREH : <color:red>Error Handling</color>
end

UREH -> UREH : Generate commitments to add or delete

alt if Commitment Operations Exist
UREH -> UREH : Generate starting indexes based on AdditionalAttributes
UREH -> RCT : Batch_Write() RelationshipCommitments
RCT --> UREH
UREH -> UREH : <color:red>Error Handling</color>
end

UREH -> UREH : Track Event Handler Wrapper
UREH -> UREH : Error Handler Wrapper

@enduml
```
